title: Amme Mookambike
desc: After being abandoned at the temple as a child, Sauparnika is raised by Surendran as a florist. However, her reputation for answered prayers shifts when Sandeep enters her life.

title: Love in Singapore
desc: An orphan, Machu triumphs but seeks justice after being duped by a fraudster.

title: Mangalyam Thanthunanena
desc: Bold and compassionate Nidhi finds joy in making others happy. She marries her friend and love, Gowtham, but family conspiracies threaten their bond. Will their love endure?
